fact_value: Management committed to sell certain Spinal Implants assets, classified as held for sale beginning November 2024
source_quote: During the fourth quarter 2024 management committed to a plan to sell certain assets associated with the Spinal Implants business (disposal group) and such assets were classified as held for sale beginning November 2024.

fact_value: Stryker received 510(k) clearance for Mako Total Hip with Advanced Primary and Revision with full market release in Q3 2025
source_quote: We received 510(k) clearance for Mako Total Hip with Advanced Primary and Revision with full market release in the third quarter of 2025.

fact_value: more than 150 million patients annually
source_quote: together with our customers, we impact more than 150 million patients annually.

fact_value: Incorporated in Michigan in 1946 as successor to business founded in 1941 by Dr. Homer H. Stryker
source_quote: Stryker was incorporated in Michigan in 1946 as the successor company to a business founded in 1941 by Dr. Homer H. Stryker, a prominent orthopaedic surgeon and inventor of several medical products.

fact_value: approximately 61 countries
source_quote: Our products are sold in approximately 61 countries through company-owned subsidiaries and branches as well as third-party dealers and distributors

fact_value: Two reportable business segments: MedSurg and Neurotechnology, and Orthopaedics
source_quote: We segregate our operations into two reportable business segments: (i) MedSurg and Neurotechnology and (ii) Orthopaedics.

source_quote:

fact_value: Orthopaedics net sales were $9,469 million in 2025 (38%), $9,077 million in 2024 (40%), $8,335 million in 2023 (41%)
Total net sales were $25,116 million in 2025, $22,595 million in 2024, $20,498 million in 2023
Instruments $3,183M (20%), Endoscopy $3,807M (24%), Medical $4,204M (27%), Vascular $1,968M (13%), Neuro Cranial $2,485M (16%)
Vascular net sales grew from $1,307 million (10%) in 2024 to $1,968 million (13%) in 2025
Stryker completed the acquisition of Guard Medical Inc., focused on Negative Pressure Wound Therapy for surgical patients
source_quote: we completed the acquisition of Guard Medical Inc., whose primary focus is on Negative Pressure Wound Therapy for surgical patients

fact_value: Neurovascular business renamed to Vascular following Inari Medical acquisition, adding venous thromboembolism products
source_quote: In 2025 we changed the name of our Neurovascular business to Vascular with the acquisition of Inari Medical, Inc. (Inari) whose product portfolio includes minimally invasive products for the treatment of venous thromboembolism.

fact_value: Medical completed acquisition of Advanced Medical Balloons (AMB), an indwelling fecal management system
source_quote: Medical also completed the acquisition of Advanced Medical Balloons (AMB), an indwelling fecal management system that specializes in solutions that help enhance care delivery by combining intelligent design with the exceptional properties of ultra-thin polyurethane.

fact_value: more than 45 countries
source_quote: we continued to expand the global footprint of Mako SmartRobotics, which is now available in more than 45 countries

fact_value: Over one million robotic Mako Total Knee procedures and more than two million robotic procedures across Mako Total Knee, Mako Total Hip, and Mako Partial Knee worldwide
source_quote: over one million robotic Mako Total Knee procedures and more than two million robotic procedures across Mako Total Knee, Mako Total Hip, and Mako Partial Knee have been performed worldwide

fact_value: Introduced Mako 4 platform built around Q-Guidance system, an advanced guidance technology for new hardware and software capabilities across subspecialties
source_quote: we introduced the Mako 4 platform, a meaningful advancement for both newly established and existing Mako sites. This platform is built around our Q‑Guidance system—an advanced guidance technology designed to enable new hardware and software capabilities across a broad range of subspecialties.

fact_value: Mako Total Hip with Advanced Primary and Revision is Stryker's first-to-market, robotically enabled revision hip arthroplasty procedure
source_quote: Mako Total Hip with Advanced Primary and Revision represents Stryker's first-to-market, robotically enabled revision hip arthroplasty procedure.

fact_value: Mako Shoulder remained in limited market release throughout 2025 with full commercial launch in the United States planned for Q1 2026
source_quote: the application remained in limited market release throughout 2025. Full commercial launch in the United States is planned for the first quarter of 2026.

fact_value: Kevin A. Lobo, age 60, serves as Chair and Chief Executive Officer, first becoming an executive officer in 2011
source_quote: Kevin A. Lobo	60	Chair and Chief Executive Officer	2011

fact_value: Stryker is one of four leading global competitors for joint replacement and trauma and extremities products and robotics, alongside Zimmer, Johnson & Johnson MedTech, and Smith & Nephew
source_quote: We are one of four leading global competitors for joint replacement and trauma and extremities products and robotics; the other three being Zimmer, Johnson & Johnson MedTech and Smith & Nephew.

fact_value: Stryker is one of five leading global competitors in Instruments, alongside Zimmer, Medtronic, Johnson & Johnson MedTech, and ConMed Linvatec
source_quote: We are one of five leading global competitors in Instruments; the other four being Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (Zimmer), Medtronic plc (Medtronic), Johnson & Johnson MedTech (a subsidiary of Johnson & Johnson) and ConMed Linvatec, Inc. (a subsidiary of CONMED Corporation).

fact_value: Orthopaedic implant surgeries are typically lower in the summer months, and sales of capital equipment are generally higher in the fourth quarter
source_quote: the number of orthopaedic implant surgeries is typically lower in the summer months, and sales of capital equipment are generally higher in the fourth quarter.

fact_value: Vascular launched the Broadway System in the United States, a fully integrated stroke solution for large- and super-bore catheter procedures
source_quote: Vascular launched the Broadway System in the United States, a fully integrated stroke solution that provides a new level of access and support in large- and super-bore catheter procedures.

fact_value: Stryker has experienced limited product availability due to an electronic component shortage in certain product lines
source_quote: in the past we have experienced limited product availability due to an electronic component shortage in certain product lines

fact_value: Several raw materials, components, finished devices and services are procured from a sole source due to quality considerations, unique intellectual property considerations or constraints associated with regulatory requirements
source_quote: several raw materials, components, finished devices and services are procured from a sole source due to, among other things, the quality considerations, unique intellectual property considerations or constraints associated with regulatory requirements

fact_value: In certain instances Stryker has been unable to meet demand due to supply chain challenges, leading to loss of sales, although impacts have not been material to date
source_quote: In certain instances we have been unable to meet demand due to supply chain challenges, which has led to loss of sales. Although the impacts have not been material to date

fact_value: Recently enacted tariffs by the United States government and retaliatory measures by other governments could adversely impact Stryker's supply chain or the availability of certain components
source_quote: recently enacted tariffs by the United States government and retaliatory measures by other governments could adversely impact our supply chain or the availability of certain components

fact_value: Stryker has been able to pass certain cost increases on to customers but has not been able to pass along all cost increases
source_quote: we have been able to pass certain cost increases on to our customers, we have not been able to pass along all cost increases and we cannot guarantee that we will be able to do so in the future

fact_value: China has implemented a volume-based procurement process designed to decrease prices for medical devices and other products
source_quote: China has implemented a volume-based procurement process designed to decrease prices for medical devices and other products.

fact_value: Stryker has reduced prices for certain products due to increased competition
source_quote: We have also reduced prices for certain products due to increased competition and if we further reduce prices, we could become less profitable.

fact_value: Strategy focuses on increasing revenue growth through innovation, new product development and improvement of existing products, including connectivity solutions
source_quote: a significant element of our strategy is to increase revenue growth by focusing on innovation, new product development and improvement of existing products, including connectivity solutions.

fact_value: Competitors may respond more quickly to or integrate new or emerging technologies such as robotics, AI and machine learning
source_quote: Our existing competitors and new market entrants may respond more quickly to or integrate new or emerging technologies such as robotics, artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning in their product offerings

fact_value: Stryker relies on indirect distribution channels to market, distribute and sell products in many markets
source_quote: In many markets we rely on indirect distribution channels to market, distribute and sell our products.

fact_value: Staggered phase-in period for manufacturers to comply with EU MDR through December 2028
source_quote: changes in regulatory requirements (such as the staggered phase-in period for manufacturers to comply with the European Union Medical Device Regulation (MDR) through December 2028)

fact_value: Stryker completed its acquisition of Inari in 2025
source_quote: including our acquisition of Inari in 2025

fact_value: Stryker has experienced security breaches, unauthorized access, and disruptions of products or systems, but they have not had a material effect to date
source_quote: We, our customers and third-party hosting services have experienced, and expect to continue to experience, security breaches of, unauthorized access to, and disruptions of, products or systems. While such breaches, unauthorized access and disruptions have not had a material effect on us to date

fact_value: Stryker is investing in cybersecurity measures including monitoring of networks and systems, use of AI, hiring of experts, employee training, and security policies
source_quote: we have made investments and expect to continue to make investments seeking to address these threats, including monitoring of networks and systems, use of AI, hiring of experts, employee training, security policies for employees and third-party providers

fact_value: Stryker is implementing a new commercial global ERP system to replace many existing operating and financial systems
source_quote: We are in the process of implementing a new commercial ERP system. This system will replace many of our existing operating and financial systems.

fact_value: Principal manufacturing and distribution facilities in the US in Arizona, California, Florida, Illinois, Indiana, Michigan, Minnesota, New Jersey, Puerto Rico, Tennessee, Texas, Utah and Washington
source_quote: We have principal manufacturing and distribution facilities in the United States in Arizona, California, Florida, Illinois, Indiana, Michigan, Minnesota, New Jersey, Puerto Rico, Tennessee, Texas, Utah and Washington

fact_value: Principal manufacturing and distribution facilities outside the US in China, France, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, the Netherlands, Poland, Switzerland and Turkey
source_quote: and outside the United States in China, France, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, the Netherlands, Poland, Switzerland and Turkey.

fact_value: Stryker manages a portion of its exposure to self-insured losses through a wholly-owned captive insurance company
source_quote: We manage a portion of our exposure to self-insured losses through a wholly-owned captive insurance company.

fact_value: Self-insured for claims and expenses related to product liability, intellectual property infringement and enforcement, environmental, and cybersecurity and data privacy losses
source_quote: are self-insured for claims and expenses related to other property and casualty losses, including product liability, intellectual property infringement and enforcement, environmental, and cybersecurity and data privacy losses.

fact_value: Some products are particularly sensitive to reductions in elective medical procedures
source_quote: Some of our products are particularly sensitive to reductions in elective medical procedures.

fact_value: Customers have experienced staffing shortages that may result in decreased demand for Stryker's products
source_quote: our customers have experienced, and may continue to experience, staffing shortages that may result in decreased demand for our products, which could negatively affect our business and financial results

fact_value: Stryker has begun deploying AI and other emerging technologies in operations and products, with continued exploration of further use cases
source_quote: We have begun to deploy AI and other emerging technologies in various facets of our operations and products and we continue to explore further use cases.

fact_value: Some IT systems contain legacy third-party software components protected by a layered security approach that may not be effective
source_quote: some of our information technology systems contain legacy third-party software components for which we depend on a layered security approach to protect against exploitation, which may not be effective

fact_value: Open-source software used in some products, services and IT systems poses risks including potential security vulnerabilities, licensing compliance issues and quality issues
source_quote: Some of our products, services, and information technology systems contain or use open-source software which poses particular risks, including potential security vulnerabilities, licensing compliance issues and quality issues.

fact_value: Unpredictable increases in demand for certain products have exceeded capacity to meet such demand timely in the past
source_quote: Unpredictable increases in demand for certain of our products have exceeded in the past, and could exceed in the future, our capacity to meet such demand timely

fact_value: The OECD has put forth two proposed frameworks: Pillar 1 (revising existing profit allocation and nexus rules) and Pillar 2 (ensuring a minimal level of taxation), and several countries enacted tax legislation based on these frameworks
source_quote: The OECD, which represents a coalition of member countries, has put forth two proposed frameworks that revise the existing profit allocation and nexus rules (Pillar 1) and ensure a minimal level of taxation (Pillar 2), respectively, and several countries enacted tax legislation based on these frameworks.

fact_value: In January 2026 the OECD released Administrative Guidance containing the Side-by-Side system (SbS System) and introduced two new Pillar 2 safe harbors for multinationals headquartered in jurisdictions including the United States
source_quote: In January 2026 the OECD released Administrative Guidance containing the Side-by-Side system (SbS System) and introduced two new Pillar 2 safe harbors for multinationals headquartered in jurisdictions including the United States with eligible tax systems.

fact_value: Stryker received a final audit report and assessments from the German Federal Central Tax Office (FCTO) related to audits of tax years 2010 through 2017
source_quote: we received a final audit report and assessments from the German Federal Central Tax Office (“FCTO”) related to audits of tax years 2010 through 2017.

fact_value: Stryker intends to defend its filing positions through the FCTO independent appeals process and, if necessary, litigation, but there can be no assurance of success
source_quote: Although we intend to defend our filing positions through the FCTO independent appeals process and, if necessary, litigation, there can be no assurance that we will be successful.

fact_value: If the German tax matter resolution results in additional income taxes, Stryker intends to seek associated foreign tax credits, but such credits may not be available on a timely basis or at all
source_quote: If the resolution of this matter results in additional German income taxes, we intend to seek associated foreign tax credits, but such credits may not be available on a timely basis or at all, or may not fully offset any additional liability.

fact_value: Governmental authorities in the United States and internationally have or are considering adopting regulations on the use of PFAS
source_quote: governmental authorities in the United States and internationally have or are considering adopting regulations on the use of per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances

fact_value: On April 1, 2025, and December 16, 2025, DOJ and SEC respectively closed their FCPA-related inquiries
source_quote: On April 1, 2025, and December 16, 2025, we were informed by the DOJ and SEC, respectively, that each agency had closed its inquiry

fact_value: Up to 4% of total company revenue
source_quote: Non-compliance with the GDPR may result in monetary penalties of up to 4% of total company revenue

fact_value: Stryker is currently a defendant in product liability matters including Rejuvenate, ABGII Modular-Neck hip stems, LFIT Anatomic CoCr V40 Femoral Heads, and Wright legacy hip products
source_quote: We are currently defendants in a number of product liability matters, including those relating to our Rejuvenate and ABGII Modular-Neck hip stems, LFIT Anatomic CoCr V40 Femoral Heads and the product liability lawsuits and claims relating to Wright Medical Group N.V. (Wright) legacy hip products

fact_value: European Product Liability Directive revised in 2024, full adoption into member state national laws by December 9, 2026
source_quote: The European Product Liability Directive was revised in 2024 and will become fully adopted into each member state's national laws by December 9, 2026.

fact_value: European Representative Actions Directive (Collective Redress Directive) mandates class action regime in each EU member state for domestic and cross-border class actions including product liability claims with medical devices
source_quote: the European Representative Actions Directive (the Collective Redress Directive) mandates a class action regime in each EU member state to facilitate domestic and cross-border class actions in a wide range of areas, including product liability claims with medical devices.

fact_value: approximately 24% of net sales denominated in foreign currencies
source_quote: approximately 24% of our net sales are denominated in foreign currencies, including the Australian Dollar, British Pound, Canadian Dollar, Euro and Japanese Yen.

fact_value: Stryker uses derivative instruments to manage the impact of currency exchange fluctuations
source_quote: we use derivative instruments to manage the impact of currency exchange, our hedging strategies may not be successful, and our unhedged exposures continue to be subject to currency fluctuations.

fact_value: COVID-19 pandemic materially impacted Stryker; any future pandemic or public health emergency could materially impact the company
source_quote: The COVID-19 pandemic materially impacted us, and any future pandemic or public health emergency could materially impact us and would heighten many of the other risks described in this report.

fact_value: Stryker reports financial results in United States Dollars, with approximately 24% of net sales denominated in foreign currencies
source_quote: We report our financial results in United States Dollars and approximately 24% of our net sales are denominated in foreign currencies, including the Australian Dollar, British Pound, Canadian Dollar, Euro and Japanese Yen.

fact_value: Stryker is subject to privacy, data protection and data security regulations globally, including HIPAA, HITECH Act, GDPR, and emerging AI-related regulations
source_quote: We are subject to a variety of laws and regulations globally regarding privacy, data protection and data security, including those related to the collection, storage, handling, use, disclosure, transfer and security of personally identifiable healthcare information and the development and use of AI in sharing certain data.

fact_value: Stryker continues to implement recommendations from the independent compliance consultant's review of commercial practices following FCPA settlements in 2013 and 2018
source_quote: We continue to implement recommendations that resulted from the independent compliance consultant's review of our commercial practices to enhance our commercial business practices.

fact_value: Stryker is currently responding to inquiries by certain foreign authorities arising in the normal course of business but does not expect material effect on financial statements
source_quote: We are currently responding to inquiries by certain foreign authorities arising in the normal course of business, however, we do not expect these matters to have a material effect, if any, on our financial statements.

fact_value: Stryker's products are subject to extensive and evolving regulations by the FDA, state governments, European Union and other governmental authorities in the United States and internationally
source_quote: The classification, manufacturing, sterilization, licensing, labeling, marketing and sale of our products are subject to extensive and evolving regulations and rigorous regulatory enforcement by the FDA, state governments, European Union and other governmental authorities in the United States and internationally.

source_quote: on December 31, 2025 our defined benefit pension plans were underfunded by $269, of which approximately $268 related to plans outside the United States.

source_quote: We intend to defend our filing positions through the FCTO independent appeals process and/or litigation as necessary.

source_quote: In April 2025 we completed the sale of the disposal group to the Viscogliosi Brothers, LLC as further discussed in Note 16.

source_quote: Consideration could increase by up to $57 or decrease by up to $245 based on the amount received.

source_quote: With the acquisition of Inari in February 2025 discussed in Note 6 to our Consolidated Financial Statements, we established a new Peripheral Vascular reporting unit consisting of the acquired Inari business.

source_quote: We performed a quantitative impairment test for our Peripheral Vascular reporting unit at October 31, 2025 and determined that its fair value exceeded its carrying amount by 12%.

source_quote: In 2025 our qualitative assessment was supplemented with a corroborative quantitative analysis which indicated that the implied fair values of our other reporting units exceed their respective carrying amounts by at least 100%.

fact_value: No guarantees or other off-balance sheet financing arrangements of material magnitude
source_quote: We do not have guarantees or other off-balance sheet financing arrangements, including variable interest entities, of a magnitude that we believe could have a material impact on our financial condition or liquidity.

source_quote: We continue to have strong investment-grade short-term and long-term debt ratings that we believe should enable us to refinance our debt as needed.

source_quote: We are currently self-insured for certain claims and expenses.

fact_value: United States Dollar, Australian Dollar, British Pound, Canadian Dollar, Euro and Japanese Yen
source_quote: Our operating results are primarily exposed to changes in exchange rates among the United States Dollar, Australian Dollar, British Pound, Canadian Dollar, Euro and Japanese Yen.

source_quote: We develop and manufacture products in the United States, Canada, China, Costa Rica, France, Germany, India, Ireland, Israel, Mexico, Poland, Switzerland, Turkey and the United Kingdom and incur costs in the applicable local currencies.

fact_value: approximately $449 (millions assumed, per 10-K convention)
source_quote: A hypothetical 10% change in foreign currencies relative to the United States Dollar would change the December 31, 2025 fair value of these instruments by approximately $449.

fact_value: Global deployment of manufacturing facilities partially mitigates the impact of currency exchange rate changes on cost of sales
source_quote: This global deployment of facilities serves to partially mitigate the impact of currency exchange rate changes on our cost of sales.

fact_value: $273 million
source_quote: The carrying value of the Spine reporting unit exceeded its fair value and a charge of $273 was recognized in goodwill and other impairments in our Consolidated Statements of Earnings.

fact_value: Decrease in future product demand due to competitive environment and increase in weighted average cost of capital
source_quote: The impairment charge for the Spine reporting unit was driven by a decrease in future product demand due to the competitive environment and an increase in the Spine reporting unit's weighted average cost of capital.

fact_value: $183 million
source_quote: Goodwill allocated to the disposal group was tested for impairment which resulted in an impairment charge of $183.

source_quote: December 31, 2024, there was no goodwill remaining attributable to the Spinal Implants disposal group.

source_quote: we recognized an estimated loss of $362 to record the disposal group at its fair value less cost to sell in goodwill and other impairments in our Consolidated Statements of Earnings

fact_value: In 2013 and 2018 Stryker settled SEC claims related to the FCPA, paying fines and penalties and retaining an independent compliance consultant
source_quote: in 2013 and 2018 we settled claims brought by the SEC related to the FCPA. Pursuant to these settlements, we paid fines and penalties and retained an independent compliance consultant
